news.t: Williams, Henry Schein, and 3 Other Bargain Stocks From a Veteran Value Fund Manager
M.D. Sass Brings High Conviction Value Strategy to ETF Market

holdings.infoBox: SASS is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Henry Schein stock at 7.45%, Primo Brands at 6.79%, AMETEK at 6.23%, The Williams Companies at 6.01%, and Quest Diagnostics at 5.41%.

overview.description: The M.D. Sass Concentrated Value ETF (SASS) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 77.11m in AUM and 22 holdings. SASS is an actively managed fund that invests in a concentrated portfolio of US -listed large- and mid-cap value companies. SASS was launched on Mar 4, 2026 and is issued by M.D. Sass.

data.title: Williams, Henry Schein, and 3 Other Bargain Stocks From a Veteran Value Fund Manager
data.text: Ari Sass of the M.D. Sass Concentrated Value ETF is hunting for reasonably priced growth stocks like Henry Schein.

data.title: M.D. Sass Brings High Conviction Value Strategy to ETF Market
data.text: NEW YORK, March 4, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- M.D. Sass, the independent asset management firm founded and led by Martin D. Sass, today announced the launch of its first exchange-traded fund (ETF). M.D. Sas...
